name: Ardmore Finance Corp.
description_short: Ardmore Finance Corp. offers personal installment loans in Texas and surrounding states with multiple branch locations and flexible borrowing options for debt consolidation and unexpected expenses.
description_long:
Ardmore Finance Corporation operates as a personal installment loan provider with a physical presence across multiple states including Texas, Missouri, Oklahoma, and Tennessee. The company maintains a Houston, TX office accessible via their website at moneywhenuneedit.com and operates under the brand name "Master Finance" in some markets. Their business model centers on direct lending to consumers seeking personal installment loans for various financial needs including debt consolidation and unexpected expenses.

The company offers personal installment loans designed to provide borrowers with flexible repayment terms and what they describe as competitive rates. Their application process requires standard financial documentation including employment history, income verification, monthly expense details, and personal information. Ardmore Finance emphasizes customized loan solutions tailored to individual borrower circumstances rather than one-size-fits-all lending products.

Ardmore Finance distinguishes itself through a multi-branch network allowing customers to select preferred loan pickup locations. The company operates during extended banking hours (Monday-Friday 9am-5:30pm, Saturday 9am-1pm) and notes that in-person office visits are required only for initial loan closing, with subsequent service available by phone. The company claims commitment to transparency, quick approvals, and personalized financial guidance throughout the borrowing process.

Notable limitations include the absence of published APR rates, loan amounts, or approval criteria on their website. The application form requests extensive personal financial details but provides no upfront clarity on terms. The company operates as a traditional installment lender rather than a modern fintech alternative, and geographic service remains limited to specific branch locations despite national reach.
pros: Multiple branch locations across 5 states (TX, MO, OK, TN) enabling local access
Extended operating hours including Saturday service (9am-1pm) for working customers
Flexible application process accommodating multiple income sources including fixed income and self-employment
In-person loan closing required only on first visit; subsequent service available by phone
Customized loan solutions explicitly tailored to individual financial circumstances
Clear application timeline with callback notification of approval amounts
Accessibility features including AudioEye toolbar for disabled applicants
cons: No published APR rates, loan amounts, or eligibility criteria disclosed on website
Extensive personal financial disclosure required (SSN, detailed expense breakdown) before approval amount revealed
Limited to fixed branch locations; no online funding or digital application completion option
No information about credit score requirements or approval likelihood for different borrower profiles
Vague marketing language ('competitive rates,' 'quick approvals') without substantive metrics or guarantees
best_for: Texas residents seeking in-person loan service with flexible underwriting for non-traditional income
Borrowers in multi-state service areas needing local branch access for loan closing
Customers with multiple income sources or fixed income seeking customized loan structures
Individuals prioritizing personal financial counseling over purely digital loan processing
diagnosis: Ardmore Finance Corp. is best suited for borrowers in their service areas who prefer traditional branch-based lending with in-person relationships and have complex income situations requiring personalized underwriting. The primary caveat is complete lack of pricing transparency—borrowers cannot assess whether rates are competitive or whether they pre-qualify before submitting extensive personal financial information.
services: Personal installment loans for debt consolidation
Personal installment loans for unexpected expenses
Customized loan solutions based on individual financial profiles
In-person loan closing and document execution
Phone-based customer service and loan account management
Multi-state branch network with customer office selection
Monthly expense analysis for loan qualification determination
Loan approval and amount notification by phone
Financial counseling and borrower guidance throughout loan process

reviews.author: markus williams
reviews.text: Applied and was told that I was out of their district. In Houston! Sounds like they didn’t want to do work on Christmas Eve because how the hell is Houston out of their district and it’s one office in Houston

reviews.author: Matthew Fincher
reviews.text: Lady so rude u can hear how I'm happy she is and she makes sure to pass it on. She will yell when you call back and if you bug her she will say your not approved. I called the other location and I was do not use people who play with u credit it would do not use

reviews.author: Karen
reviews.text:
READ AND BEWARE >>>

I dont think I could ever do business with them. I parked in front of the establisment and it was before they opened, and I was waiting for them to open on a Saturday (they open at 9:00am) I was gathering my documents when I saw 2 older women talking to each other about how they hate people that park in front of their office to go eat at the restaurant at the end of the shopping center. How they wish they could tow the people who aren't their customer. they said vile comments I wont repeat but that speaks about character . I heard enough to take my business elsewhwre and based on thr other reviews I am not alone.

Someones grandmas need to retire..

They also have a sign that do not want anyone whose not a Customer to walk in. So if you have Questions forget about getting service if you dont intend to take a loan with them. Grotesque vile old women

reviews.author: Kevin Gunter
reviews.text: After reading some of the reviews. All I can say is I know these ladies can be frustrated but I understand it's business and situations happen for some of us to be late for variety of reasons. Other than that. I'll definitely keep my business with these ladies. They have a boss to answer to aswell and I'm very grateful that Ms Theresa gave me a second chance. I have issues going on job related and personal but I'm doing the most I can this time better than before. Plan to pay them off before or by December. I've known Ms Theresa for some years now and anyone who knows her would be lucky to have her accommodate you. Blessings

reviews.author: Miranda Bustos
reviews.text: Zero Star Rating Worst Place to Take Loans out with very ruid and unprofessional, The amount of interstate is ridiculous save yourself and stay far away!!!!
